creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Koop Mast <kwm@rainbow-runner.nl> wrote:

> After some digging it seems that this issue can be caused by two
> things. The most like is that gd can't resolve the fonts correctly
> because it doesn't have fontconfig support. The second is that
> graphviz doesn't have pangocairo support.


That was ist! 

pangocairo in graphviz was "off"


Thank you.

Heino
